content.en:
"Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor!"

Emperor Guangling was very annoyed, the person shown in the Time and Space Emperor Mirror was none other than the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor who had been extracted from the Soul Origin Memory 10,000 years ago.

"Shi Ying Dao Ancestor happens to have an ice Dao-level natal talent, and he was once an emperor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and he was reused by the Heavenly Emperor Palace. Last time, the Heavenly Emperor Palace misunderstood him and let his potential be abolished, and in order to make up for him, he also gave him a good position, in charge of 100,000 Heavenly Army, and trained Heavenly Army in a newly built training base. But I didn't expect that he would dare to slaughter the family under the command of the Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

Emperor Guangling said to himself coldly.

As for why Shi Ying Dao Ancestor slaughtered the Feng family, he didn't know very well, but he didn't want to know either.

What a treasure the Time and Space Emperor Mirror was, he knew very well that it was a top forbidden weapon created by the Vast Sea Ancestor with a top forbidden treasure, and no concealment method could escape the detection of the Time and Space Emperor Mirror.

Unless the other party did not leave any traces, the space-time emperor mirror could not absorb any breath, and it would naturally not be able to detect it.

But now, after absorbing the breath of the other party, it is the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor who has been detected, and this kind of exploration method is more reliable than directly extracting the soul origin memory.

Therefore, this matter is 100% certain, it was Shi Ying Dao Ancestor who did it!

I saw that Emperor Guangling waved his hand, and directly smashed the Luanfeng Continent to pieces, completely turning it into ashes, and then turned around and returned to the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

As soon as he returned to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, Emperor Guangling took out the incarnation of the Time and Space Emperor Mirror and handed over the detected picture to many emperors to watch.

Suddenly, all the emperors were extremely angry.

......

Heavenly Emperor Palace, No. 6 Heavenly Army Training Camp.

Thundered!!!!

An emperor descended, and all the heavenly armies and reserve heavenly armies bowed one after another.

"Meet the Emperors!"

"Meet the Emperors!"

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor also appeared, and hurriedly bent down and bowed: "Shi Ying has seen all the emperors!"

But he soon realized that something was wrong, these emperors exuded anger all over their bodies, and their aura locked on him one by one.

"What's going on, could it be that I've been lazy recently and haven't trained the Heavenly Army properly?

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor was puzzled.

Then.

Emperor Guangling said coldly: "Shiying Dao Ancestor, you slaughtered the Feng family under the command of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and your behavior is very bad, such as today the Emperor Palace issued a heavenly rule and put you to death!"

"What!"

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor was extremely puzzled, when did he kill the Feng family?

"Emperors, I really didn't slaughter the Feng family, don't kill me, you can extract my soul origin memory, and you will know that I didn't speak!"

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor hurriedly said.

He felt that extracting the Soul Origin Memory would prove his innocence, and in this way, he would not have to die.

Although his soul defect was even greater if he extracted the soul origin memory again, he couldn't be promoted to the strongest Dao Ancestor anyway, so he didn't care about that.

However, Emperor Guangling sneered: "Shi Ying, you are very good, I guess that you have some rare means to directly change your soul origin aura, maybe the Forbidden Void Realm is really refined by you." To tell you the truth, this time we used the Time and Space Emperor Mirror, you may not know much about the Time and Space Emperor Mirror, in short, once the Time and Space Emperor Mirror is used, as long as it is detected, even the invincible Dao Ancestor will not be able to hide his identity. The Time and Space Emperor Mirror detected that it was you who destroyed the Feng family with your own hands. Well, we don't have time to hear from you!"

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor wanted to explain something, but Emperor Guangling directly took action.

Bang!

The body of the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor exploded directly, and the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor was at the extreme, and he had no chance to resist at all, and was directly killed by the Guangling Emperor.

After killing the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, the emperors left one by one.

With the fall of the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, this matter came to an end, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace could be regarded as giving an explanation to the countless families under the command of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

And the Heavenly Emperor Palace did not suspect Ye Tian at all, after all, the ability to copy the talent was too terrifying, and the Time and Space Emperor Mirror could not detect Ye Tian's identity, and only found out that this was the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor based on the copy body.

Terran.

Ye Tian quickly inquired that Shi Ying Dao Ancestor was executed by the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

In this regard, he can only express regret.

In the following days, Ye Tian cultivated wholeheartedly, participated in the Dao Technique, and strived to cultivate the Dao Technique to the extreme level as soon as possible.

As for the impact on the Supreme Dao Ancestor, he was not in a hurry.

He had mastered the power of the Dark Forbidden and the Forbidden Body, and he had also comprehended the Endless Forbidden Dao, and it was not difficult for him to break through to become a Supreme Dao Ancestor.

But he didn't want to be in such a hurry to enter the Supreme Dao Ancestor level, because he still wanted to accumulate a little more foundation.

At the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor level, the stronger the strength, once it breaks through to the Supreme Dao Ancestor level, the strength will skyrocket by a large margin.

Strictly speaking, the Supreme Dao Ancestor and the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor are not only the difference in strength, but also equivalent to two realms.

Once he breaks through to the Supreme Dao Ancestor, the Dao Ancestor's body will become the Supreme Dao Body, and it will automatically comprehend the Powerful Dao, while Ye Tian comprehends the Endless Forbidden Dao that surpasses the Extremely Powerful Dao.

Therefore, if he broke through to the level of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, the forbidden body would be improved by a small section, and the Endless Forbidden Dao would also instantly gain countless insights and improve by a small section.

In addition, his Dao Ancestor body, forbidden Dao power, and soul will also undergo transformation.

Therefore, many Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors obviously have a great deal of confidence in breaking through to become the strongest Dao Ancestor, but they have not broken through for a long time, just because they want to accumulate a little more.

Ye Tian's current combat power has reached the extreme of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but this combat power standard is the combat power standard of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, it does not mean that he has reached the limit of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, he can continue to improve, why is he in a hurry to break through?

When Ye Tian was in retreat, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, and Ye Yu also began to impact the Dao Ancestor level one after another, and they succeeded one by one and became the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

At this point, the high-end power of the human race is much more.

In the following days, some forbidden treasures were born in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm one after another, and on several occasions, Ye Tian did not participate in them, but let some of the true ancestors and Dao ancestors of the human race fight for it.

Maybe the major forces have regulations, and the fighting is much less, but every time the forbidden treasure is born, no matter how much it is restricted, the fight still cannot be banned.

But on the surface, everyone has a rule that Dao Ancestor is not allowed to make a move on the True Ancestor, unless that True Ancestor takes the initiative to provoke the Dao Ancestor.

If there is no restriction, the Dao Ancestors will slaughter the True Ancestors in large numbers, how will the True Ancestors still rise, and how will they grow?

In a flash, tens of thousands of years have passed.

this day.

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm calmed down, but there was a slight change in the Dark Forbidden Realm, which was not very far away from the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.
